---
title: "AI_Detection"
author: "Annika Richter"
date: "2026-06-16"
output: pdf_document
---

```{r setup, include=FALSE}
knitr::opts_chunk$set(echo = TRUE)
```
```{r}
library(dplyr)
```

# How well did participants acutally detect whether they were interacting with a human or an AI chatbot? 
```{r}
# Load Interleaf data
df <- read.csv("../../Data/df_interleaf_measures.csv")
```

```{r}
# How many ratings were actually extreme enough, that they can be interpreteted as "confident human" or "confident AI?"
df <- df %>%
  mutate(
    confidence_interaction_partner = case_when(
      ai_detection_rating <= 30 ~ "human",       # confident "human"
      ai_detection_rating >= 70 ~ "ai",          # confident "AI"
      TRUE            ~ "uncertain"     # 26–74, the middle
    )
  )

df %>% count(confidence_interaction_partner)
sum(df$confidence_interaction_partner) == "uncertain")             # How many ratings are uncertain in total? 
mean(df$confidence_interaction_partner) == "uncertain")            # How many percent of ratings are uncertain? 
```
```{r}
# Truth in certain ratings
conf <- df %>%
  filter(band != "uncertain") %>%
  mutate(
    truth_ai    = shared_condition_order == "with_ai",
    response_ai = band == "ai",
    correct     = response_ai == truth_ai
  )

mean(conf$correct)                    # overall accuracy on confident judgments

conf %>%                              # split out: better at spotting AI or humans?
  group_by(shared_condition_order) %>%
  summarise(n = n(), accuracy = mean(correct))
```



```{r}
# Each person's accuracy vs. 50% chance
acc_p <- conf %>% group_by(participant) %>% summarise(acc = mean(correct))
t.test(acc_p$acc, mu = 0.5)

# or model-based, handling clustering
library(lme4)
m <- glmer(correct ~ 1 + (1 | participant) + (1 | dyad), data = conf, family = binomial)
plogis(fixef(m)[["(Intercept)"]])     # accuracy estimate adjusted for clustering
```


```{r}
acc_p <- conf %>% group_by(participant) %>% summarise(acc = mean(correct))
t.test(acc_p$acc, mu = 0.5)
```


```{r}
# Sum Contrasts: Code human-AI as -0.5 and human-human as 0.5
df$shared_condition_order <- as.factor(as.character(df$shared_condition_order))
contrasts(df$shared_condition_order) <- c(-0.5, 0.5)
```
```{r}
df


0 - 25
75 - 100
-> How many does this cover
-> How many of those are correct? 
```
